description: gpstools — native Android (Kotlin + Jetpack Compose) geotag GPS camera. Capture photos with a clean, customizable location stamp (lat/long, address, date/time, map thumbnail, custom fields). Hybrid monetization (ads + one-time IAP + subscription). India-first. Premium hook = PDF photo-proof report.

userStories.title: Project scaffold
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a buildable Android Compose project so all later work has a base.
acceptanceCriteria: Android Studio project: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, single-activity, Material 3
Package id com.gpstools.camera, app name 'gpstools', minSdk 24, targetSdk current
App launches to a placeholder Home screen
./gradlew assembleDebug succeeds (build passes)
Verify app launches on Android emulator
userStories.notes: Scaffolded with Gradle 8.9 wrapper, AGP 8.5.2, Kotlin 2.0.21, Compose BOM 2024.10.01, compile/targetSdk 35, minSdk 24. Builds + launches placeholder Home on emulator.

userStories.title: Navigation skeleton
userStories.description: As a user, I want to move between the main screens of the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Bottom navigation with three tabs: Camera, Gallery, Settings
Each tab shows a distinct placeholder screen
Camera is the default/start destination
./gradlew assembleDebug succeeds
Verify navigation between tabs on Android emulator
userStories.notes: Bottom NavigationBar (Material 3) with Camera/Gallery/Settings tabs wired via Navigation Compose NavHost. Camera is start destination. Each tab shows a distinct PlaceholderScreen. Verified tab switching on emulator-5554.

userStories.title: Runtime permissions flow
userStories.description: As a user, I must grant camera + location so the core feature works.
acceptanceCriteria: Request CAMERA and ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION when entering the Camera tab
Show rationale UI if denied; deep-link to app settings if permanently denied
No crash when permissions denied; show a helpful empty state
./gradlew assembleDebug succeeds
Verify grant and deny paths on Android emulator
userStories.notes: Accompanist Permissions (0.36.0) gates the Camera tab on CAMERA + ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION. Auto-requests on first entry via LaunchedEffect; shows rationale UI when recoverably denied and a Settings deep-link empty state when permanently denied (shouldShowRationale==false after a request). Granted -> camera placeholder. Verified all three paths (dialog, permanently-denied empty state, granted) on emulator-5554; no crash.

userStories.title: Camera preview
userStories.description: As a user, I want a live camera preview so I can frame my shot.
acceptanceCriteria: CameraX preview fills the Camera screen
Shutter button visible; front/back camera toggle works
Handles lifecycle (pause/resume) without crashing
./gradlew assembleDebug succeeds
Verify preview renders on emulator or device
userStories.notes: CameraX (1.4.0: core/camera2/lifecycle/view) live Preview fills the Camera screen via AndroidView(PreviewView, FILL_CENTER). Shutter button (capture deferred to US-006) + front/back lens toggle shown only when both lenses exist; lensFacing in rememberSaveable. LaunchedEffect(lensFacing) rebinds (unbindAll first) and falls back to the available lens if the requested one is missing; DisposableEffect unbinds on leave for lifecycle safety. awaitCameraProvider() bridges the ListenableFuture via suspendCoroutine (no guava-coroutines dep). Verified on emulator-5554: live virtual-scene preview renders, lens flip switches front/back without crash (pid stable).

userStories.title: Acquire location + reverse-geocoded address
userStories.description: As a user, I want my current coordinates and address detected automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Use FusedLocationProvider to get lat/long (high accuracy) with timeout + fallback
Reverse-geocode to a human address via Geocoder; show 'locating…' then result
Show accuracy in meters; graceful message if location unavailable
./gradlew assembleDebug succeeds
Verify a real lat/long + address render on screen on emulator
userStories.notes: FusedLocationProviderClient.getCurrentLocation(PRIORITY_HIGH_ACCURACY) with a 12s withTimeoutOrNull, falling back to lastLocation; play-services-location 21.3.0. Geocoder reverse-geocode uses the async GeocodeListener API on API 33+ (MUST register onError too, else the continuation hangs at 'Finding address…') and the blocking API off Dispatchers.IO below. State machine (LocationUiState in location/LocationProvider.kt): Locating -> Available(coords, geocoding=true 'Finding address…') -> Available(coords, address, geocoding=false); Unavailable when no fix. Overlay (ui/screens/LocationInfoOverlay.kt) is a semi-transparent panel at top of the camera preview showing address, lat/long (6dp, monospace), and ±N m accuracy. Verified on emulator-5554 with `adb emu geo fix`: coords + ±5 m render immediately, full Bengaluru address resolves after network comes up.

userStories.title: Capture photo to storage
userStories.description: As a user, I want to take a photo and have it saved.
acceptanceCriteria: Shutter captures a full-resolution image via CameraX ImageCapture
Saved to app-scoped storage and registered with MediaStore on capture-complete
Capture works without a stamp yet (stamp added in US-007)
./gradlew assembleDebug succeeds
Verify a captured file exists and is viewable on emulator
userStories.notes: Shutter wired to a CameraX ImageCapture use case (CAPTURE_MODE_MAXIMIZE_QUALITY) bound alongside Preview in CameraPreview.kt's bindToLifecycle. capture/storage logic in media/PhotoStorage.kt: capturePhoto() -> takePicture(OutputFileOptions, mainExecutor, OnImageSavedCallback). OutputFileOptions writes JPEG into MediaStore Images EXTERNAL_CONTENT_URI with DISPLAY_NAME GPS_<yyyyMMdd_HHmmssSSS>.jpg + RELATIVE_PATH Pictures/gpstools on API 29+ (scoped storage, no perm); manifest declares WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE maxSdkVersion=28 for API<=28. isCapturing guard disables the shutter mid-capture; Toast on saved/failed. Verified on emulator-5554: tapped shutter -> GPS_20260615_095909725.jpg registered in MediaStore (Pictures/gpstools/, 60KB), pulled file is a valid 1856x1392 baseline JPEG with Exif (no stamp yet -> US-007). No crash.

userStories.title: Render a basic location stamp onto the photo
userStories.description: As a user, I want location/time info burned onto my photo so it's proof-ready.
acceptanceCriteria: After capture, composite an overlay onto the bitmap: address, lat/long, date/time
Overlay is legible (semi-transparent panel, readable type) and saved into the final image
Stamp renders correctly in both portrait and landscape captures
./gradlew assembleDebug succeeds
Verify the saved image visibly contains the stamp on emulator
userStories.notes: Capture switched from direct-to-file (OutputFileOptions) to in-memory (ImageCapture.OnImageCapturedCallback) so the stamp can be composited before encoding. PhotoStorage.kt: takePicture on a background ioExecutor -> decode JPEG -> rotate upright via imageInfo.rotationDegrees (so portrait AND landscape stamp correctly) -> drawStamp -> save to MediaStore (RELATIVE_PATH+IS_PENDING on Q+, absolute DATA path under public Pictures on API24-28); result posted to main thread. New media/PhotoStamp.kt: StampData(timestamp, lat?, lon?, accuracy?, address?) + drawStamp() renders a semi-transparent black panel (alpha 150) across the FULL width at the BOTTOM with white shadowed text — bold wrapped address, monospace 'lat, lon  ±N m', then 'dd MMM yyyy HH:mm:ss z'. Type sizes scale from REFERENCE_WIDTH=1080 so it's legible at any resolution; greedy wrapText() never loops on long words. CameraPreview snapshots locationState (LocationUiState.Available) into StampData at shutter-press (date/time always stamped; coords null until a fix). Tradeoff: decode->re-encode drops original EXIF (proof data is burned into pixels; JPEG_QUALITY=95). Verified on emulator-5554: tapped shutter -> GPS_20260615_100612617.jpg (126KB, valid 1392x1856 upright JPEG) shows the full Bengaluru address + 12.971598, 77.594565  ±5 m + '15 Jun 2026 10:06:12 GMT+05:30' burned into the bottom panel.
